feat.name: Guardian Resiliency
feat.prerequisite: *Guardian Dedication*; class granting no more Hit Points than 10 + your Constitution modifier
feat.text: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each guardian archetype class feat you have. As you continue selecting guardian archetype class feats, you continue to gain additional Hit Points in this way.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
